name: Up a Tree
description: You are about ten feet above the ground, balanced among thick branches that creak under the assumption you know what you’re doing. The branch above you is just out of reach, which feels deliberate. Nearby sits a bird’s nest containing a large, jeweled egg that looks wildly out of place in a forest canopy. The egg is hinged, delicately clasped, and constructed with far more care than any reasonable bird would bother with. It appears extremely fragile.
